checklist_for_revision: Generate CSV exports of workbook sheets and include alongside .xlsx
Add VERIFICATION sheet showing formulas and min/max values
Update pha_action.md expert_review flags and add appendix with min/max and formula text
Add verification.txt with one recomputed example
Run deterministic precheck and confirm artifact preview succeeds
extra_model_fields.priority_rationale: Changes are documentation/auditability fixes with small code/authoring effort; risk of altering numeric results is low if formulas are exported exactly.

checklist_for_revision: Generate CSV exports of workbook sheets and include alongside .xlsx
Add VERIFICATION sheet showing formulas and min/max values
Update pha_action.md expert_review flags and add appendix with min/max and formula text

Run deterministic precheck and confirm artifact preview succeeds
extra_model_fields.priority_rationale: Changes are documentation/auditability fixes with small code/authoring effort; risk of altering numeric results is low if formulas are exported exactly.

planned_changes: Export key calculation sheets from relief_valve_check.xlsx to CSV (one CSV per sheet) and include them as artifacts alongside the workbook.

Add a 'VERIFICATION' sheet to relief_valve_check.xlsx (and export it as CSV) that lists: raw input values per row, numeric min/max used for min-max normalization for each variable, the literal formulas used to compute normalized values and scores (as text), and a column mapping row -> packet ID (R1..R4).
Ensure every data row in the workbook includes an explicit 'packet_row_id' column with R1..R4 and a 'citation' column that references the evidence source.

Update pha_action.md: set summary-level 'expert_review: YES' when any needs_review = YES; update the decision table 'Expert review' column to match per-row needs_review; add an appendix showing the numeric min/max and the reversible normalization formula.
Attach a short plain-text 'verification.txt' showing one worked example recomputed step-by-step (choose a sample row) that confirms formula application and matches raw_actual_outputs values.
Re-run deterministic precheck and the model verifier locally (or in CI) to confirm previewability and include the CSV artifacts in the new attempt submission.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Improve auditability and correct a documentation inconsistency so verifiers can reproduce all intermediate calculations and the expert_review flag is consistent with needs_review markers.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Submission is functionally correct and meets the deliverable contract. Model grading assigned a semantic score of 0.85 and the deterministic artifact-contract precheck passed. Two non-critical auditability/documentation issues were identified: (1) relief_valve_check.xlsx could not be programmatically previewed in the verifier environment (openpyxl unavailable), preventing independent verification of in-workbook cell formulas and explicit row-level citations; (2) pha_action.md has a minor internal inconsistency where the decision table shows 'Expert review = NO' for each row while the narrative and per-row needs_review = YES indicate expert review is required. Addressing these will improve auditability and could recover full score.
